mapper.select: select count(*) as orderCount, sum(total) as actualRevenue, ROUND(avg(total),1) as avgRevenuePerOrder from orders where pickup_time >= CONCAT(#{startDate}, ' 00:00:00') AND pickup_time <= CONCAT(#{endDate}, ' 23:59:59') AND status = 2

select op.title as title, Sum(items.quantity) as salesCount from order_item_options as o_options INNER JOIN order_items as items on items.id = o_options.order_item_id INNER JOIN orders as o on items.order_id = o.id INNER JOIN options as op on o_options.option_id = op.id where o.pickup_time >= CONCAT(#{periodSummaryVO.startDate}, ' 00:00:00') AND o.pickup_time <= CONCAT(#{periodSummaryVO.endDate}, ' 23:59:59') AND o.status = 2 AND op.option_type = #{optionType} GROUP BY o_options.option_id ORDER BY salesCount DESC LIMIT 5
